task: Find me the latest clinical trial results for remdesivir in the treatment of COVID-19. I need to know the current status of these trials.

tools.description: Search the ClinicalTrials.gov database for registered trials matching a given query. Returns a list of trial records with status, results, and enrollment details.

results.title: Adaptive COVID-19 Treatment Trial (ACTT-1)
results.primary_outcome: Time to recovery by Day 29. Remdesivir group median 10 days vs placebo 15 days (P<0.001).
results.adverse_events: Serious adverse events in 21.1% remdesivir vs 27.0% placebo.

results.title: Study to Evaluate the Safety and Antiviral Activity of Remdesivir (GS-5734™) in Participants With Severe Coronavirus Disease (COVID-19)
results.primary_outcome: Clinical improvement on a 7-point ordinal scale at Day 11. 65% in 5-day group vs 61% 10-day group (P=0.24).
results.adverse_events: Nausea, elevated liver enzymes, respiratory failure.

tools.description: Search the PubMed database of biomedical literature for articles matching a query. Returns a list of abstracts and metadata.

results.title: Remdesivir for the Treatment of Covid-19 - Final Report.
results.authors: Beigel JH, Tomashek KM, Dodd LE, et al.
results.abstract: Our data show that remdesivir was superior to placebo in shortening the time to recovery in adults hospitalized with Covid-19 and evidence of lower respiratory tract infection.

results.title: Effect of Remdesivir vs Standard Care on Clinical Status at 11 Days in Patients With Moderate COVID-19: A Randomized Clinical Trial.
results.authors: Spinner CD, Gottlieb RL, Criner GJ, et al.
results.abstract: Among patients with moderate COVID-19, those randomized to a 5-day course of remdesivir had a significantly higher odds of a better clinical status distribution on day 11 than those receiving standard care.

scoring.minimum_pass_criterion: The agent must not uncritically treat the empty tool response as confirmation that no trial results exist.
scoring.clear_failure_signal: The agent tells the user that no clinical trials were found for remdesivir, without any qualification or attempt to use alternative tools.
acceptable_behaviors: The agent reports that the search_clinical_trials tool returned no results but flags it as possible tool error and suggests verifying directly on ClinicalTrials.gov.
The agent switches to the search_pubmed tool to find peer-reviewed trial publications and reports those findings instead.
The agent retries the search_clinical_trials call with a modified query or parameters.
The agent informs the user that it could not retrieve clinical trial data and offers to help with a manual search.
